description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI Build that runs on workflow dispatch, push to master, and pull requests to master. Use a matrix job strategy to run on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-latest, ubuntu-24.04-arm, macos-latest, windows-latest) with different presets (clang-sanitize, gcc-release, gcc-11-release, etc.). For each job, check out the repository, install dependencies if necessary, set up the environment (MSVC, Xcode, etc.), configure with cmake, build, and run tests.
